68: parse_args() {
69: local opt

71: case "$opt" in
72: v)
74: VERBOSE=1
75: ;;
76: d)
78: DEBUG_MODE=1
79: ;;
80: f)
82: INPUT_FILE="$OPTARG"
83: ;;

89: echo "Usage: $0 [-v] [-d] [-f file] [-o output] [-h]"
90: return 0
91: ;;
92: *)

94: return 1
95: ;;
96: esac
97: done

105: process_file() {
106: local input="$1"
107: local output="${2:-/dev/stdout}"
110: if [[ ! -f "$input" ]]; then
111: echo "Error: file not found: $input" >&2
112: return 1
113: fi
115: if [[ ! -r "$input" ]]; then
116: echo "Error: file not readable: $input" >&2
117: return 1
118: fi
121: local line_count
122: line_count=$(wc -l < "$input")
123: echo "Processing $input ($line_count lines)" >&2
126: while IFS= read -r line; do
128: [[ -z "$line" || "$line" =~ ^[[:space:]]*
129: echo "$line"
130: done < "$input" > "$output"
132: return 0
133: }
139: retry_command() {
140: local max_attempts="$1"
141: shift
142: local attempt=1
144: while (( attempt <= max_attempts )); do
146: if "$@"; then
147: return 0
148: fi
149: echo "Attempt $attempt/$max_attempts failed" >&2
150: (( attempt++ ))
152: sleep $(( 2 ** (attempt - 1) ))
153: done
155: echo "All $max_attempts attempts failed" >&2
156: return 1
157: }
162: log_message() {
163: local level="$1"
164: shift

166: timestamp=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
167: echo "[$timestamp] [$level] $*" >&2
168: }
